data.body: Plan-review PASSED round 3 (signed) after 2 remediations. Impl commit 068ba1842. The gate correctly BLOCKED the original Pass-1-injection design (would break the pinned test_prior_findings_only_reach_the_novelty_seam + ADR 0008 Inv.1). Pivoted to the sanctioned post-Pass-1 recall step: sidecar.prior_concerns + run_pass1 adds missed prior findings (by norm_id) as _recall candidates through the UNCHANGED Pass-2 backstop; finder byte-unchanged. Fixed vague AC4 (concrete pytest cmd running the independence test too), lowercase decision filter, named constants, best-effort fallback. 5 residual advisories triaged: _recall is observability-only (underscore-internal like _too_big); best-effort covers reader-error+no-sidecar; recall-lift is #3's offline job. Tests: test_pass1_recall.py (9) + independence suite green.
